section_title: Forgery for purpose of harming reputation
chapter_title: Of Offences Relating to Documents and to Property Marks
text: Whoever commits forgery, intending that the document or electronic record forged shall harm the reputation of any party, or knowing that it is likely to be used for that purpose, shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to three years, and shall also be liable to fine.
